core_mechanism: characterization of stationary (invariant) probability measures — i.i.d. product measures and translation-invariant Markov measures — preserved under a deterministic local update rule acting as a measure-preserving transformation on a bi-infinite lattice of states
brief_reason: The abstract formulates a time evolution on bi-infinite configuration spaces and derives sufficient conditions for the invariance of Bernoulli product measures and a criterion for the invariance of two-sided space-homogeneous Markov distributions under that deterministic dynamics.
